languages.text: Здесь добывают неорганические химические соединения, которые затем используются в других промышленных производствах.

traits.locale_text: Здесь добывают неорганические химические соединения, которые затем используются в других промышленных производствах.
Здесь добывают неорганические химические соединения, которые затем используются в других промышленных производствах.

languages.text: Here, inorganic chemical compounds are extracted that are later used in other industrial production.
languages.original_text: Здесь добывают неорганические химические соединения, которые затем используются в других промышленных производствах.

traits.locale_text: This mining complex helps extract inorganic chemical compounds that are later used in other industries.
This mining complex helps extract inorganic chemical compounds that are later used in other industries.
Here, inorganic chemical compounds are extracted that are later used in other industrial production.

languages.text: Hier werden anorganische chemische Verbindungen gewonnen, die später in anderen industriellen Produktionen verwendet werden.
languages.original_text: Here, inorganic chemical compounds are extracted that are later used in other industrial production.

traits.locale_text: Hier werden anorganische chemische Verbindungen gewonnen, die später in anderen industriellen Produktionen verwendet werden.

languages.text: On y extrait des composés chimiques inorganiques qui sont ensuite utilisés dans d'autres productions industrielles.
languages.original_text: Here, inorganic chemical compounds are extracted that are later used in other industrial production.

traits.locale_text: On y extrait des composés chimiques inorganiques qui sont ensuite utilisés dans d'autres productions industrielles.

languages.text: Aquí se extraen compuestos químicos inorgánicos que luego se utilizan en otras producciones industriales.
languages.original_text: Here, inorganic chemical compounds are extracted that are later used in other industrial production.

traits.locale_text: Aquí se extraen compuestos químicos inorgánicos que luego se utilizan en otras producciones industriales.

languages.text: Burada, daha sonra diğer endüstriyel üretimlerde kullanılacak olan inorganik kimyasal bileşikler çıkarılır.
languages.original_text: Here, inorganic chemical compounds are extracted that are later used in other industrial production.

traits.locale_text: Burada, daha sonra diğer endüstriyel üretimlerde kullanılacak olan inorganik kimyasal bileşikler çıkarılır.
